name: bank-management-system
description: Multi-tenant bank management system with Next.js web, Fastify API, Prisma schema, JWT/RBAC, ledger, loans, KYC, reports, and notifications.

scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @bank/shared && npm run dev --workspace @bank/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace @bank/api
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @bank/shared && npm run build --workspace @bank/auth && npm run build --workspace @bank/db
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @bank/api && npm run build --workspace @bank/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
